'''Zorba''', also known as '''Zorba the Hutt''', was a [[Gender|male]] [[Hutt]] who had ties with the [[The galaxy|galactic]] underworld during the [[Imperial Era|reign]] of [[Galactic Emperor|Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]] and operated out of his [[Zorba's palace|palace]] in the [[Southern Rim]]. After [[Razzi warehouse raid|seizing]] low-grade [[andris]] [[spice]] from the [[Razzi Syndicate]]'s warehouse, [[Qi'ra]] suggested "squeezing" Zorba the Hutt to find what he knew of the spice's provenance.<ref name="Smuggler's Guide" /> He shared his name with [[Zorba's Back]], one of the largest of three stone archways that stood at the entrance of [[Arch Canyon]], on the [[planet]] [[Tatooine]].<ref name="Podracer Mission">''[[Choose Your Destiny: A Podracer Mission]]''</ref>
{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:ZorbaMugshot-HNN.png|thumb|right|180px|Zorba Desilijic Tiure in the ''Star Wars'' Legends continuity]]
Zorba was first [[canon]]ically mentioned in a model sheet created for "[[Hunt for Ziro]],"<ref name="Temple Archives Hunt for Ziro">[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Three|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' The Complete Season Three]]</ref> the ninth episode of the animated television series ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''{{'}} [[The Clone Wars: Season Three|third season]], which aired on [[November 12]], [[2010]].<ref name="Hunt for Ziro Old EG">{{SWArchive|url=theclonewars/guide/episode309.html|text=''The Clone Wars'' Episode Guide: Hunt for Ziro}}</ref> The sheet, credited to [[Darren Marshall]], was included in the special features of the [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars The Complete Season Three|third season's Blu-ray]] release, showcasing the [[Twi'lek]] chorus girls which appeared in the final episode. One of the Twi'lek's headdresses was adorned with a symbol said to be associated with Zorba, however concept art of [[Oruba]] the Hutt was included to the side.<ref name="Temple Archives Hunt for Ziro" /> In the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity, Zorba first appeared in the [[1992]] junior novel ''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'', written by [[Paul Davids|Paul]] and [[Hollace Davids]]. Despite the fact that he was the father of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] in that continuity,<ref name="Zorba the Hutt's Revenge">''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]''</ref> no connection has been made between Zorba and [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure's father]] in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' canon so far.<ref name="Super Graphic">''[[Star Wars Super Graphic: A Visual Guide to a Galaxy Far, Far Away]]''</ref>
